title: Chéticamp Region (Nova Scotia) - Canada.ca
content:
## Chéticamp Region Nova Scotia

## Chéticamp Region Nova Scotia
The Chéticamp Region, which includes Saint-Joseph-du-Moine, is the Acadian heart of the famous Cabot Trail. As a traditional fishing village, this community is nestled between the majestic mountains of Cape Breton Island and the waters of the Gulf of Saint Lawrence. Discover welcoming people through their dances, songs and traditions. A thriving community where opportunities abound!
Where is the Chéticamp region?
